overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rain-soaked dystopian futuristic city street. The scene features abandoned vehicles, palm trees, elevated monorail tracks, and transitions from a narrow street to an open plaza with neon signage. Heavy rain and overcast skies create a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

NPCs become visible standing on the elevated metal platform to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-soaked street past abandoned vehicles and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-drenched dystopian city street with an overturned green van and wrecked cars littering the left side. The camera moves forward past palm trees and elevated walkways, approaching a monorail bridge in the distance. Two NPCs stand watch on a metal platform to the left as heavy rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area beneath monorail overpass entering open plaza

events.description: entering the shadow of the monorail overpass, significantly reducing ambient light
exiting the covered area under the bridge into the open plaza with visible neon signage

agents.ego_description: passing under the monorail bridge and continuing into the plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the wet plaza in the distance

entered.detail: futuristic passenger train moving across the overpass overhead
bright green traffic barriers with black hazard stripes
large circular neon sign with 'HAVEN' text in red and white letters

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the monorail bridge where a train travels overhead, moving from the shadowed underpass into a more open plaza area. The lighting shifts from dim to brighter as the HAVEN neon sign becomes visible in the distance. Green concrete barriers line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with neon signage and seating areas near transit entrance

events.description: approaching the HAVEN sign and the group of NPCs gathered near the seating area
approaching the stairway entrance leading downward to a lower level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the neon HAVEN sign and the stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: person in blue hooded jacket standing near the HAVEN sign
two individuals sitting on concrete benches under palm trees

entered.detail: row of curved concrete seating with NPCs resting under palm trees
descending stairs leading to a lower level or subway system
glowing white cross symbol mounted on the building facade
large concrete planters containing mature palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the open plaza dominated by the large circular HAVEN neon sign. NPCs sit on concrete benches beneath palm trees while others stand near the sign. The ground transitions from asphalt to paved tiles. The camera approaches a stairway leading downward as the rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-drenched dystopian street that gradually opens into a bright, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by navigating a debris-strewn road past an overturned green van and wrecked cars, moving beneath elevated walkways and palm trees toward a distant monorail bridge. As the camera passes under the bridge and the overhead train, the scene shifts from the dim shadows of the underpass into a more open area where green concrete barriers line the path. The environment then expands into a wide plaza as the lighting brightens, revealing a large circular HAVEN neon sign and NPCs resting on concrete benches. Finally, the ground transitions from asphalt to paved tiles, reflecting the heavy rain as the camera approaches a downward stairway.
